creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
To clarify my previous comment:
"the new version is backward compatible [with] the version in the tree"
should read as
"backward compatible with the API of the version in the tree", abeit with some deprecation warnings.

The packages depending on the run-time ABI (i.e. ocaml libraries) should be still be rebuild, hence the many PORTREVISION bumps included in the offered patch.
